items.title: North Korea’s crypto heist playbook is expanding and DeFi keeps getting hit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The increase in North Korea's crypto heists highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, potentially impacting investor confidence and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Why AI agents may be pushing Solana and Ethereum into separate roles
items.whyYouShouldCare: The distinct roles emerging for Solana and Ethereum due to AI agents could influence developer focus and resource allocation within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Singapore’s OCBC launches tokenized gold fund on Ethereum and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: OCBC's launch of a tokenized gold fund on both Ethereum and Solana enhances the utility of Solana, potentially attracting more users and increasing ecosystem engagement.
